summary: Single Reserved6 long proposal with one parseable filter; computable at T0 with adequate-to-tight expected sample size and broad exit compatibility.

analyses.distinctness_notes: No existing archetype slug matches 'r6_bigmove_simple_long' in the preview. Reserved6 channel is underrepresented (35 entries) and a single-condition taker_buy_ratio_5m≥0.55 long filter on R6 is structurally unique versus the pricechange-dominated top entries. The minimal-AND design is a deliberate architectural pivot per pattern_miner, not a value tweak of an existing R6 archetype.
analyses.triggers_estimate_method: Reserved6 base ~800 events / 30d × ~0.50 long-side share × ~0.30 taker_buy_ratio_5m≥0.55 cut rate (moderately permissive threshold, slightly above neutral 0.5) ≈ 120. Conservative given pattern_miner notes baseline R6 trigger count ~120.
analyses.exit_compatibility_notes: With only one filter and a broad taker-buy bias signal, fixed exits dominate per coverage_summary (fixed: median +0.217, only positive family). Recommend fixed TP/SL as primary; breakeven as secondary if early-move stickiness emerges. Avoid multi_tp and time_only (universally negative in R2 grid). Trail is marginal but worth including given long-momentum thesis.
